nasb.text: I gave you a land on which you had not labored, and cities which you had not built, and you have lived in them; you are eating of vineyards and olive groves which you did not plant.’

esv.text: I gave you a land on which you had not labored and cities that you had not built, and you dwell in them. You eat the fruit of vineyards and olive orchards that you did not plant.’

cnv.text: 我賜給你們的土地，不是你們勞苦開墾的；我賜給你們的城市，不是你們建造的，你們卻住在城中；你們享用的葡萄園和橄欖園，也不是你們栽種的。’

ccb.text: 你们没有开垦土地，也没有建造城邑，但我赐给你们土地和城邑，使你们住在其中，享用别人栽种的葡萄园和橄榄园的果子。’
